title: novelinks Stackable Plastic Clear Storage Box Containers with Latching Lid - Art Craft Supply Organizer Storage Containers for Pencil Box, Lego, Crayon, Beads, Jewelry (12 Pack Small -Clear)
features: Storage Container Dimensions: The SMALL BOX measures 5.1"L x 5.1"W x 2"H. the MEDIUM BOX measures 10.2"L x 5.1"W x 2"H. the LARGE BOX measures 15.2"L x 5.10"W x 2"H. Stackable and durable, easy to carry

Versatile: Clear plastic storage boxes suitable for storing and organizing various small items such as beads, coins, jewelry findings, cosmetics, crafts and more. Keep your surface clean and tidy, no more mess again
Sets: There are different combinations of large, medium and small sets to choose from, to meet your different storage needs
Stackable: The stackable design allows you to easily stack multiple boxes together, to save space and keep your desk neat and organized
Convenient to Use: Being translucent in nature, the contents of the box are clearly visible, making the product even more convenient for the users for the purpose of identifying the contents
description: Product Description Oh Snap Snap. Fixed. Stacking. With these snaps, your crafts are always ready when you are! Stackable No more wasted space Feel free to stack items according to the size of your space! See Through Can't find the item which you want to use? Look no further! We've made it easier to find!
